questionHtml: Calculate the indirect tax paid by airlines for the catering meals they bought in 2021 if the domestic indirect tax rate on food was 6.5 % and their expenditure on meals was US$54 506.70.
markschemeHtml:
Expenditures without the tax =54506.701.065=51180

Any valid working should be rewarded with [1].

Sales tax paid = 54 506.70 - 5 1180 = $3326.70

An answer of $3326.70 without working is sufficient for [1].

Any valid alternative calculation should be rewarded.

e.g. 54 506.7 × (0.065/1.065) = $3326.70

For full marks to be awarded the response must provide valid working and include correct units.

meta.title: Calculate the indirect tax paid by airlines for the catering meals they bought in 2021 if the domestic indirect tax rate on food was 6.5 % and their expenditure on meals was US$54
